title: Roller Brush Tangled or Jammed
shortDescription: The main roller brush is tangled with hair or debris and cannot rotate
fullDescription: E1 on Tineco vacuums indicates the main roller brush is tangled with hair or debris and cannot rotate. The LED display or iLoop app will show this code to help diagnose the issue.

causes.cause: Large debris jammed in brush housing

fixSteps.title: Turn off and inspect
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off the vacuum and check the related component for obvious issues.

fixSteps.title: Clean the affected area
fixSteps.instruction: Remove debris, clean filters, or empty tanks as appropriate for this error code.

fixSteps.title: Reset the vacuum
fixSteps.instruction: Hold the power button for 10 seconds to perform a reset.

fixSteps.title: Contact Tineco support
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, contact Tineco customer support through the app or website.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after cleaning and resetting.
videoSearchQuery: Tineco vacuum E1 error roller brush tangled or jammed fix

faq.q: What does E1 mean on my Tineco?
faq.a: The main roller brush is tangled with hair or debris and cannot rotate.

faq.q: How do I fix E1?
faq.a: Clean the affected component, empty tanks, and reset the vacuum.

faq.q: Where can I get Tineco support?
faq.a: Contact Tineco through the Tineco app or their website support page.
